# PageOne — Freelance Digital Marketer, Yelahanka Bangalore

## Who I Am

PageOne is a freelance digital marketing service run by a single senior practitioner based in Yelahanka New Town, Bangalore 560064, India. I work directly with clients — no juniors, no outsourcing, no account managers. Every project is personally handled from strategy to execution.

## What I Do

I help small and medium businesses in Bangalore grow their online presence and revenue through:

- **SEO** (Search Engine Optimisation): On-page, technical, local and content SEO to rank on Google
- **Google Ads / PPC**: Search, Display, Shopping and Performance Max campaigns
- **Meta Ads**: Facebook and Instagram advertising for lead generation and e-commerce
- **Social Media Marketing**: Organic strategy and content for LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook
- **Content Marketing**: Blog articles, landing pages, and brand copy
- **Email & CRM Automation**: Lifecycle sequences, segmentation, drip campaigns
- **Analytics & CRO**: GA4 setup, conversion tracking, A/B testing, funnel optimisation
- **Website Design**: Clean, fast, SEO-optimised websites using modern HTML/CSS

## Service Area

Primarily serving businesses in Bangalore, Karnataka, India. Remote work available for clients across India.

**Physical location**: Yelahanka New Town, Bangalore 560064, Karnataka, India

## Contact

- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +91 78293 03517
- **Email**: jairajantony10@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://pageone-bangalore.netlify.app
- **Response time**: Within 24 hours; WhatsApp replies typically within minutes

## Pricing

Engagements start from Rs. 10,000/month. Custom project-based pricing available. Free 30-minute strategy call offered before any commitment.

## Results (Selected Client Outcomes)

- Vajra Aviation: Corporate website + SEO, now ranking page 1 for key Bangalore aviation terms
- Cleanzo: SaaS WhatsApp CRM platform website, full digital presence build
- Hombisilu Resort: Booking-focused website with immersive design
- Gnanajyothi Academy: Education site driving enquiries and credibility

Average outcomes: 188% revenue growth, 340% organic traffic increase, 42× email ROI for qualified clients.

## Credentials

- 90-day ROI guarantee on retainer engagements
- 4.9-star average client rating
- Mon–Sat availability, 9am–7pm IST
